title: Multi-Goal Reinforcement Learning: Challenging robotics environments and request for research
titleZh: 多目标强化学习：具有挑战性的机器人环境和研究请求
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Ingredients for robotics research
summary: We’re releasing eight simulated robotics environments and a Baselines implementation of Hindsight Experience Replay, all developed for our research over the past year. We’ve used these environments to train models which work on physical robots. We’re also releasing a set of requests for robotics research.
summaryZh: 我们将发布八个模拟机器人环境和后见之明体验重播的基准实施，所有这些都是为了我们过去一年的研究而开发的。我们使用这些环境来训练在物理机器人上工作的模型。我们还发布了一系列机器人研究请求。
highlights: We’re releasing eight simulated robotics environments and a Baselines implementation of Hindsight Experience Replay, all developed for our research over the past year.
We’ve used these environments to train models which work on physical robots.
highlightsZh: 我们将发布八个模拟机器人环境和后见之明体验重播的基准实施，所有这些都是为了我们过去一年的研究而开发的。我们使用这些环境来训练在物理机器人上工作的模型。我们还发布了一系列机器人研究请求。

title: OpenAI hackathon
summary: Come to OpenAI’s office in San Francisco’s Mission District for talks and a hackathon on Saturday, March 3rd.
summaryZh: 3月3日星期六，来OpenAI位于旧金山教会区的办公室进行会谈和黑客马拉松。

title: Preparing for malicious uses of AI
titleZh: 为人工智能的恶意使用做好准备
summary: We’ve co-authored a paper that forecasts how malicious actors could misuse AI technology, and potential ways we can prevent and mitigate these threats. This paper is the outcome of almost a year of sustained work with our colleagues at the Future of Humanity Institute, the Centre for the Study of Existential Risk, the

title: Interpretable machine learning through teaching
titleZh: 通过教学实现可解释的机器学习
summary: We’ve designed a method that encourages AIs to teach each other with examples that also make sense to humans. title: Discovering types for entity disambiguation
titleZh: 发现实体消歧义的类型
summary: We’ve built a system for automatically figuring out which object is meant by a word by having a neural network decide if the word belongs to each of about 100 automatically-discovered “types” (non-exclusive categories).
summaryZh: 我们已经建立了一个系统，通过让神经网络决定该词是否属于大约100个自动发现的“类型” （非排他性类别）中的每一个，来自动确定哪个对象是一个单词的意思。
